deck_goal: Recommend a grounded China EV market-entry plan for Europe and Southeast Asia.
audience: Regional strategy leaders deciding 2025 market sequencing

slides.title: China EV Market Entry: Europe & Southeast Asia Strategy
slides.goal: Frame the strategic question and set audience expectations for a data-grounded 2025 market-entry recommendation.
key_points: 中国新能源汽车出口已从单点放量转向分区域深化（2022–2024）
欧洲适合追求品牌抬升与高客单价，东南亚适合追求进入速度与渠道复制
先东南亚、后欧洲是更稳妥的2025市场进入路径
电池成本下降18%为价格带竞争和渠道投入预留了缓冲空间
visual_elements: Two-region header graphic (Europe left, Southeast Asia right) with directional arrows
Minimal deck intro; no charts needed
slides.speaker_notes: 此页为开场摘要，聚合四份来源的核心结论，供战略决策者快速建立议题框架。

slides.title: 出口时间线 (Export Timeline)
slides.goal: Show the chronological shift in China EV export strategy from single-point to multi-region deepening.
key_points: 2023年：开始形成欧洲与东南亚双主线
2024年：渠道建设重心转向分区域深化
visual_elements: Horizontal three-stage timeline with year labels 2022, 2023, 2024
Year nodes with brief descriptors; directional arrow left-to-right
Annotations on 2023 node noting dual-track (Europe + SE Asia) and on 2024 noting regional deepening
slides.speaker_notes: 来源src-01:sec-01明确指出2022-2024年中国新能源汽车出口节奏从单点放量转向分区域深化。三个时间节点构成演进叙事，建议以时间轴形式呈现，便于受众理解战略演变节奏。

slides.title: 欧洲 vs 东南亚对比 (Europe vs Southeast Asia Comparison)
slides.goal: Present the structural tradeoffs between Europe and Southeast Asia as entry destinations to anchor the sequencing decision.
key_points: 欧洲：单车收入更高；认证、关税和售后合规压力更重
东南亚：渠道建立更快，本地合作伙伴响应更灵活
欧洲适合追求品牌抬升与高客单价；东南亚适合追求进入速度与渠道复制
visual_elements: Two-column comparison table with headers: Europe | Southeast Asia
Rows for: Unit revenue, Certification burden, Tariff pressure, After-sales compliance, Channel speed, Partner responsiveness, Strategic fit
Color coding: warm tone for Europe, cool tone for Southeast Asia
slides.speaker_notes: 来源src-01:sec-02对比了两区域的核心差异。欧洲高单价高门槛，东南亚快通道低成本。建议在幻灯片中以对比表格呈现，使决策者一目了然。

slides.title: 进入路径 (Entry Path)
slides.goal: Communicate the recommended stepwise entry sequence from Southeast Asia validation to Europe expansion.
key_points: Step 1：在东南亚建立经销、服务和备件响应体系
Step 2：将验证过的运营模型迁移到欧洲重点国家
东南亚优先再择机进入欧洲，是更稳妥的2025市场进入路径
visual_elements: Two-step process flow: Step 1 (Southeast Asia) → Step 2 (Europe)
Arrow connector between steps with 'Validated model transfer' label
Sub-bullets under each step listing channel, service, and spare-parts elements
slides.speaker_notes: 来源src-02:sec-01明确建议先东南亚后欧洲两步进入路径。幻灯片应清晰展示两步流程及其因果关系：第一步验证运营模型，第二步向欧洲迁移。

slides.title: 成本与利润指标 (Cost & Margin Indicators)
slides.goal: Quantify the battery cost reduction that enables competitive pricing and channel investment headroom.
key_points: 过去12个月动力电池包成本下降18%
18%的电池成本降幅为价格带竞争和渠道投入预留了利润缓冲
visual_elements: Single-bar or delta arrow graphic showing -18% battery pack cost (12-month trailing)
Annotated callout: 'Pricing flexibility ↑' and 'Channel subsidy headroom ↑'
Optional: before/after margin comparison placeholder for future unit data
slides.speaker_notes: 来源src-03:sec-01提供18%电池成本降幅这一关键数字，是全deck唯一的量化指标。建议以简洁的下降箭头或条形图呈现，突出其对定价和渠道投入的传导效应。

slides.title: Decision Backbone
slides.goal: Compress the minimum grounded claims into an actionable decision backbone for 2025 market sequencing.
key_points: 中国EV出口已从单点放量转向分区域深化（src-01:sec-01）
欧洲适合品牌抬升高客单价，东南亚适合速度与渠道复制（src-01:sec-02）
先东南亚验证运营模型，再择机进入欧洲，是更稳妥的2025路径（src-02:sec-01）
电池成本下降18%为定价和渠道投入预留缓冲（src-03:sec-01）
visual_elements: Four-point decision backbone list with source tags
No charts; text-driven summary for executive recall
Optionally: small directional icons (clock for timeline, scale for comparison, arrow for process, chart for cost)
slides.speaker_notes: 本页为决策主干，汇集四份来源的核心结论，供战略决策者快速回顾并锚定2025市场进入时序建议。每条结论均标注来源编号，确保可审计性。
